name: Spinach Salad Orientale
recipeInstructions:
To make the dressing:
1. Combine 1 cup sunflower oil, 1/2 cup sugar, 3/4 cup chopped onion, 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce, 1/4 cup catsup, and 1/4 cup red wine vinegar in a bowl.
2. Mix all dressing ingredients together until well combined.
3. Refrigerate the dressing.
To prepare the salad:
1. Wash and drain the spinach thoroughly.
2. Chop the bacon into small pieces.
3. Slice the water chestnuts and chop the eggs.
4. In a large bowl, combine the chopped spinach, bean sprouts, bacon, water chestnuts, and eggs.
5. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Serve immediately.
